title: agrostis stolonifera subsp. sokolovskajae
intro: Agrostis stolonifera subsp. sokolovskajae is a subspecies of creeping bentgrass, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe and Russia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera subsp. sokolovskajae include its potential to treat digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
